name: MsiExec Web Install Detected
description: Suspicious execution of msiexec.exe with a web URL in the command line, potentially indicating initial access, defense evasion, or payload delivery via a remotely hosted MSI.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the msiexec.exe process creation.

parameters.name: Image
parameters.description: The full path to the msiexec.exe executable.

parameters.name: CommandLine
parameters.description: The full command line arguments of msiexec.exe, including the web URL.

parameters.name: ParentImage
parameters.description: The full path to the parent process that launched msiexec.exe.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account under which msiexec.exe was executed.

parameters.name: ComputerName
parameters.description: The hostname of the system where the msiexec.exe process was created.

parameters.name: RuleName
parameters.description: The Sysmon rule name that triggered the alert, if available.
